experiences.role: Curriculum Developer and Instructor Full-Stack JavaScript
experiences.desc: Mentored a cohort of 50 students in Full Stack JavaScript development, teaching Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, React, and RESTful APIs. Conducted code reviews, technical mentoring, and project evaluations while guiding students to build end-to-end full-stack applications using industry best practices.

Migrated 20+ dashboards from Spotfire to Power BI, centralized the data warehouse, and implemented SSIS ETL for large-scale migrations. Built Finance/HSE/Operations dashboards serving 7,000+ users and delivered Power BI training to expand internal data capabilities.

Developed Power BI dashboards for Danone (Pharma & Finance), reconfigured Row Level Security, and enabled sales teams to monitor performance. Built SSIS ETL for Avrist Assurance and created Tableau dashboards, cutting ETL load time from 80% to 40%.

Led multiple Power BI dashboards for Antam’s Digital Control Tower; designed scalable data models/marts for finance, exploration, sales, and more, presenting insights to Antam’s Board. Maintained Tableau Server across Ubuntu/Linux/Windows and resolved client issues (BRI Life, Finnet, MoH, Lintasarta, Bank Syariah Indonesia, Admedika).

Built raw material price prediction using Python (ARIMA & LSTM) achieving ~80% accuracy for procurement cost optimization. Developed dashboards with Power BI and Tableau to help users interpret data easily.
